stemHtml: Which statement does correspond to the definition of severe turbulence?

options.a: Difficulty in walking, occupants feel strain against seat belts, loose objects move about.
options.b: Aircraft may be out of control for short periods, occupants are forced violently against seat belts, loose objects are tossed about.
options.c: Aircraft will be damaged and an emergency landing will be absolutely necessary.
options.d: Aircraft gets out of control and crashes.
